lista.layer_parallelism: Each layer has 3 independent matrix-vector ops (A@h, A^T@r, W@h) that can be pipelined
lista.batch_parallelism: Full batch parallelism across channel estimates
intra_layer: A @ h: matrix-vector multiply, parallelizable across M rows
A^T @ residual: matrix-vector multiply, parallelizable across N rows
W @ h: N x N matrix-vector, parallelizable across N rows
lista.inter_layer: Sequential (layer k+1 depends on layer k output)
lista.hardware_utilization: High — identical ops per layer, regular data flow, no branches
lista.fpga_suitability: Excellent — fixed computation graph, no dynamic control flow

omp.description: Iterative greedy algorithm with dynamic support set
omp.batch_parallelism: Full batch parallelism across channel estimates
intra_iteration: Correlation A^T @ r: parallelizable across N atoms
Least squares: k x k system solve, parallelizable but small
omp.dynamic_behavior: Support set selection (argmax) requires reduction across N values
omp.hardware_utilization: Moderate — support set varies per iteration, irregular memory access
omp.fpga_suitability: Moderate — dynamic argmax and varying LS dimension complicate pipelining

lasso.intra_iteration: Same as LISTA per iteration (A@h, A^T@r, soft-threshold)
lasso.fpga_suitability: Poor — too many iterations for hardware pipelining

lista.access_pattern: Sequential — same matrix-vector ops every layer, predictable address sequence
lista.cache_behavior: Excellent — W^(k) matrices fit in L1/L2 cache for N=64 (16KB each)
lista.bandwidth_requirement: Low — parameters loaded once per inference, reused across batch

omp.storage: A matrix: 256*64*4 = 65536 bytes; support set: 5 indices
omp.access_pattern: Semi-random — argmax scans all N correlations, LS accesses support columns
omp.cache_behavior: Moderate — A matrix access is column-wise (stride M), support set is random
omp.bandwidth_requirement: Moderate — A matrix loaded every iteration, residual updated

lasso.storage: A matrix: 256*64*4 = 65536 bytes; h vector: 64*4 bytes
lasso.access_pattern: Sequential — same as LISTA per iteration
lasso.cache_behavior: Good per iteration, but 200 iterations increase total bandwidth
lasso.bandwidth_requirement: High — 200 iterations of full matrix-vector products
